note: Auto-split capsule payment in the web wallet. When a single-recipient send carries a capsule and the converged tx size exceeds the 16,000-byte policy cap, the wallet now offers to break the amount into N smaller transactions to the SAME recipient, each carrying the SAME capsule, broadcast sequentially. Default chunk = 150 SOST (4-input chunk fits comfortably under 16 KB even with a maximal capsule). The split confirm dialog lists the proposed amounts; OK begins the loop. Each chunk: refreshBalance, _inflightReconcile + _filterInflight (so chunk N+1 never re-picks chunk N's UTXOs), 4-pass fee converge, hard refuse if the chunk itself still exceeds 16 KB, _inflightAdd before broadcast, _inflightRelease on failure. UI shows 'Auto-split: i / N' progress and a final report listing every broadcast txid (or, on failure, where it stopped). Single-recipient + capsule below the cap is unchanged. Multi-recipient + capsule remains blocked by design (single-recipient capsule per tx is the v13 contract). Non-capsule >16 KB sends keep falling through to the 100-KB consensus check. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO node, NO miner, NO transaction wire format. Pure wallet ergonomics.
